name: Raspberry Ribbon Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
2. Add undrained raspberries, pineapple, and salt to the dissolved gelatin.
3. Pour 1 1/2 cups of the gelatin mixture into a 6 to 8 cup glass dish.
4. Chill until firm.
5. Let remaining gelatin stand at room temperature.
6. Carefully spread 1 cup sour cream over chilled gelatin.
7. Spoon half of the remaining gelatin over top.
8. Chill until firm.
9. Layer with remaining sour cream, then top with remaining gelatin.
10. Chill several hours.
Note: May also be used as a dessert.
